About Me

About Me

I'm Abdessamad Bourkibate

Interdisciplinary Computer Science Student | Cybersecurity & AI Enthusiast

I'm currently pursuing a Bachelor of Computer Science at University of the People (USA), alongside academic studies at Al-Madinah International University (Malaysia). I'm a passionate learner focused on cybersecurity, artificial intelligence, digital systems, and interdisciplinary research, with a strong interest in bridging technology with ethical, legal, and governance frameworks.

My Education

Education is not the learning of facts, but the training of the mind to think.

Research Publications

Explore my published research papers and academic contributions.

Quantifying Vulnerability in Sociotechnical Family Systems

PDF
Preprint 2026

Quantifying Vulnerability in Sociotechnical Family Systems: A Centrality-Based Mitigation Framework

TechRxiv

A novel framework modeling families as sociotechnical graphs to identify digital vulnerabilities using centrality metrics and propose targeted mitigation strategies.

DOI: 10.36227/techrxiv.176948811.18136133/v1

Cybersecurity Graph Theory Family Safety Network Centrality
View PDF Cite

The Sovereign Home Protocol: Re-Engineering Digital Immunity

PDF
Preprint 2026

The Sovereign Home Protocol: Re-Engineering Digital Immunity Through Embedded Network Isolation and the Axiological Dimension of Privacy

SSRN Electronic Journal

A framework redefining the residential router as a "Sovereign Border Gateway" through credential revocation, SSID obfuscation, WPA3 encryption, and Guest Network segmentation to restore digital sovereignty.

SSRN ID: 5935436

Cybersecurity Network Isolation Privacy Digital Sovereignty
View PDF Cite

Entropy-Driven Gradient Stability in Large Language Models

PDF
Preprint 2026

Entropy-Driven Gradient Stability in Large Language Models: A Non-Equilibrium Thermodynamic Framework for Reinforcement Learning Optimization

Research Square

A non-equilibrium thermodynamic framework addressing chaotic optimization dynamics in LLMs during reinforcement learning, replacing heuristic PPO clipping with entropy-driven gradient stability.

Research Square: rs-8812364/v1

LLMs Reinforcement Learning Thermodynamics Optimization
View PDF Cite
View All Publications

Projects Made

Explore my latest AI-powered applications and research projects

AI / NLP

ScamGuard AI

A novel hybrid architecture using Linear SVM + BERT NLP that addresses the growing challenge of religious-based social engineering detection.

Python BERT SVM NLP

Experience

Geeks Institute

AI Full-Stack Web Developer

Sept 2025 - Present · Technopark Casablanca (Hybrid)

Actively learning and contributing within Geeks Institute, participating in hands-on technical projects related to cybersecurity, artificial intelligence, and digital systems.

University of the People

Student Ambassador

June 2025 - Present · California, USA (Remote)

Serving as a Student Ambassador at University of the People, supporting student engagement and representing the university community.

Aspire Institute

Aspiring Leader | Internship

Feb 2026 - Present · United States (Remote)

Participated in Aspire Leaders program, a leadership development initiative, where I trained in strategic thinking, team collaboration, and practical leadership skills.

• Engaged in hands-on projects to strengthen decision-making and problem-solving abilities
• Developed communication and leadership skills through workshops and team activities
• Applied leadership principles in real-life scenarios and group challenges

MASAQ Center

Head Technician

Sept 2025 - Present

Missions: To deliver flawless technical operations for conferences and the flagship event La Sira Animée, with complex audiovisual and livestreaming requirements.
Solution: Led the technical team, set up full AV infrastructure (sound, lighting, projection), and implemented a reliable live-streaming system.
Result: Zero technical issues during events and a significant increase in audience reach thanks to high-quality online streaming.

Université Hassan II (FLHSM)

President of the Digital Psychology and AI Club

Oct 2024 - Dec 2024

Led student initiatives exploring the intersection of Artificial Intelligence and Human Psychology. Organized workshops on how digital tools impact mental well-being.
